penalties.description: Task not completed within video sequence - automatic zero score

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion. Claude reports incomplete task with automatic zero score, while GPT reports full completion in 65 seconds. Given the fundamental nature of this disagreement and the automatic-zero condition for incomplete tasks taking precedence in the rubric, the conservative interpretation (incomplete task) is applied.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete task condition overrides timing measurements per rubric automatic-zero rules

claude_value.description: The video ends without showing task completion - not all objects have been transferred back to the original side.

disagreements.rationale: Task completion is binary and takes precedence over all other scoring considerations
If task is incomplete, later phases cannot have been genuinely completed
Incomplete task results in automatic zero per rubric rules regardless of timing
